summary: Binaural dummy‑head recording with mixed sonic clarity but a standout Scarlet Begonias → Fire On The Mountain sequence.
review: The two fans agree the show’s highlight is the blazing Scarlet Begonias into Fire On The Mountain, which one reviewer calls a favorite. The recording was made with a binaural dummy‑head microphone; one user rates its sound quality only average (3★) and wonders about mic placement, while another gives it top marks despite no technical comments.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive remarks about the performance offset a modest recording quality rating; limited data (2 reviews) yields moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Binaural dummy‑head capture; reviewers note unclear sonic advantage versus other mics and question mic elevation/placement, leading to an average sound quality assessment.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire On The Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed setlist comments; only the Scarlet Begonias → Fire On The Mountain transition is highlighted as a high point.
